content:
🚀 This version integrates the chaos event into literary history, introduces a rare “heavenly item” per week, and finalizes the professor’s weekly actions as dictated by the chosen POV.

📜 1. The Chaos Event – A Literary Catastrophe Rendered in Gameplay

📜 The mid-semester shake-up (Week 6 or 7) is now tied to an event from literature, manifesting as a narrative-altering challenge.

✔ The event takes on one of three possible historical fiction-inspired crises.
✔ Each event is randomized at the start of the semester—students won’t know what’s coming.
✔ The event shifts class dynamics and can permanently alter XP distributions, item availability, or faction standings.

📖 Three Possible Chaos Events (Selected Randomly in Week 6)
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 354 (chunk 354/555)
